title: podman untag
body:
### Issue Description

Using `podman untag <tag>` removes **all** tags from the associated image ID. Afterwards, the image is only listed with repository and tag `<none>`.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
(Use any image, but in this example `docker.io/library/postgres:16-alpine`)
1. `podman image tag postgres:16-alpine test-a:latest`
2. `podman image tag postgres:16-alpine test-b:latest`
3. `podman image untag test-b:latest`

### Describe the results you received

After step 2, `podman image ls` shows:
```
REPOSITORY                  TAG         IMAGE ID      CREATED       SIZE
localhost/test-b            latest      108b27c919e6  2 months ago  279 MB
localhost/test-a            latest      108b27c919e6  2 months ago  279 MB
docker.io/library/postgres  16-alpine   108b27c919e6  2 months ago  279 MB
```

After step 3, `podman image ls` shows:
```
REPOSITORY  TAG         IMAGE ID      CREATED       SIZE
<none>      <none>      108b27c919e6  2 months ago  279 MB
```


### Describe the results you expected

After step 3, `podman image ls` **should** have shown:
```
REPOSITORY                  TAG         IMAGE ID      CREATED       SIZE
localhost/test-a            latest      108b27c919e6  2 months ago  279 MB
docker.io/library/postgres  16-alpine   108b27c919e6  2 months ago  279 MB
```

### podman info output

### Additional information

_No response_

comments.body:
https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/markdown/podman-untag.1.html

> podman untag image [name[:tag]…]

> Remove one or more names from an image in the local storage. The image can be referred to by ID or reference. If no name is specified, all names are removed from the image. If a specified name is a short name and does not include a registry, localhost/ is prefixed (e.g., fedora -> localhost/fedora). If a specified name does not include a tag, :latest is appended (e.g., localhost/fedora -> localhost/fedora:latest).
